title: Spacetime Foam: A Review — Carlip et al.
subtitle: Wheeler's spacetime foam — quantum fluctuations of geometry at the Planck scale, observational constraints, and the topology of the quantum vacuum

summary.one_line: A comprehensive review of Wheeler's spacetime foam (1962-2022): the Planck-scale quantum fluctuations of geometry that underlie classical space-time, and the observational programs constraining foa...
summary.scope: Covers the history of the foam concept, Wheeler's original arguments, quantum fluctuations of the metric, topology change, Einstein metrics, holographic foam models, and observational constraints from gamma-ray astronomy and interferometry.

sources.label: Carlip et al. — Spacetime Foam: A Review (2022). arXiv:2209.14282 [gr-qc]. 26 pages. PDF in corpus.

body.text: Spacetime foam IS Māyā tattva (6) at the physical level. Māyā is the 'veil' — the point at which pure geometry (the amplituhedron's positive cells) becomes the fluctuating foam of emergent space-time. The foam is not a defect of reality — it IS the transition from L₁ (pure principles) to L₂ (causal accessibility). Wheeler's foam IS the veil, experienced as the Planck-scale turbulence of the vacuum. Consciousness, in its ordinary state, averages over the foam to produce classical space-time. In nonordinary states, the averaging fails and the foam is experienced directly.

The foam fluctuations are non-computable — they cannot be predicted from prior states. Each foam fluctuation IS a moment of genuine novelty. This IS the physical substrate of śaktipāta (grace). Grace is not supernatural — it IS the foam's irreducible randomness expressing itself as the freedom of the system. The five degrees of śaktipāta correspond to five levels of foam coupling: from complete coupling (tīvratīvra — the foam directly shapes experience) to minimal coupling (manda — the foam is averaged out by strong classical constraints).

gaps: Full extraction of the 26-page review needed; detailed mapping of foam models to tattva levels

issues.title: Full extraction needed
issues.description: The review covers 60+ years of foam research. Only the most philosophically relevant passages extracted.

versions.summary: Initial RO for the spacetime foam review. 2 passages mapping foam to Māyā and grace.

timeline.event: RO created. Spacetime foam is now formally mapped to Māyā tattva and śaktipāta.
